# Automation scripts

Electronics provides dozens of User Language Programs (ULP) and a few scripts that automate common tasks such as converting a CAM job to a script to export DXF data, or setting palette colors. To access these scripts, with an open document, click AUTOMATE and you see icons for ULP and Script. Each one can be used to open a directory of available scripts.

[Image: Automation panel]

To learn how to write your own ULPs, see the Reference topic "User language programming".
